creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
While looking at an arm64 objdump issue (PR 212308) I took a look at the top 50 or so failing ports by # of downstream skipped packages.

While looking at that, I noticed that the following ports that failed due to no sbrk:

devel/libgtop
devel/rvm
graphics/graphviz
lang/gauche
sysutils/bacula-client
sysutils/bacula5-client
sysutils/bareos-client
